title: Canopy Growth's Stock Jumps on Q3 Earnings & MTL Acquisition
text: Canopy Growth's stock jumped on Q3 2026 earnings announcement and MTL acquisition news. Third-quarter results highlighted Canopy's growth in Canada with impressive revenue bump and cost-saving measures. Revenue jumped to C$90.39M from C$86.24M in the same period last year. Earnings per share saw a positive change, dropping the loss from (C$1.11) to just (C$0.18). In fiscal Q3 2026, the company reported revenue of $75 million Canadian dollars while adjusted EBITDA losses narrowed to about CA$3 million, marking third consecutive quarter of improvement. The MTL acquisition represents a strategic move in the company's growth strategy.
